descriptor: A narrow-shouldered, slender figure with a utilitarian chin-length bob, featuring rough, calloused hands with bitten-down fingernails, dressed in simple, loose-fitting dark clothing.
A tall, lean frame with long hair tied back in a half-bun, displaying elegant, long-fingered hands that constantly fidget with a small ring, wearing a neatly tailored but slightly oversized shirt.
A slight, compressed figure of below-average height in faded, meticulously clean clothes—worn grey shirt and bleached blue trousers—standing with a rigid posture and wearing plastic sandals.
An upright, observant figure carrying a worn notebook, viewed from behind as a silhouette with a neat, tightly secured hairstyle, projecting a stiff, guarded stance.
A broad-shouldered, tense figure in a slightly masculine-cut jacket, standing with a rigid, confrontational posture, with hair cropped short at the nape of the neck.
A relaxed, casual silhouette with an easy, unguarded slouch, hands often shoved deep into trouser pockets, wearing a simple, unbuttoned collared shirt.
A middle-aged woman with a stiff, bureaucratic posture, wearing a neatly tucked blouse and carrying a clipboard, her hair pinned up in a tight, formal bun.

A short, elderly woman with a hunched back and grey hair tied in a loose knot, wearing a faded, traditional loose-fitting blouse, viewed from behind as she bends over to wipe a table with a warm towel.
A distant silhouette of a solitary figure walking away, carrying a single worn suitcase, the posture showing exhaustion and a definitive departure.
A frail, elderly woman sitting rigidly on a low stool, viewed from behind, her thin shoulders draped in a dark, traditional shawl, with wisps of white hair escaping a bun.
